{
  "dag": {
    "edges": []
  },
  "ready_window": [],
  "status": "in_progress",
  "tasks": [
    {
      "id": "enforce_promoted_invariant_inv_006454ec",
      "issue_refs": [
        "inv_gate_unenforced_inv_006454ec"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39_close_promoted_invariant_enforcement_backlog",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Use agent_state/enforced_invariants.json: INV-006454ec requires actor_kind=verifier and error_class=verification_failed.",
        "Inspect src/app.rs in dispatch_executor_submits route/executor gate region (~lines 1125-1290).",
        "Add invariant-state injection: when verifier verification_failed recent count >= threshold, insert actor_kind=verifier and error_class=verification_failed into state before evaluate_invariant_gate.",
        "Ensure this feeds into existing evaluate_invariant_gate(\"route\" or \"executor\") without breaking existing ordering.",
        "Preserve all existing invariant semantics and blocking behavior.",
        "Run cargo build --workspace.",
        "Run cargo test --workspace."
      ],
      "title": "Enforce promoted invariant INV-006454ec in runtime dispatch"
    },
    {
      "id": "reduce_dispatch_executor_submits_complexity_phase1",
      "issue_refs": [
        "auto_branch_reduce_canon_mini_agent_0f2928230a1e73d0",
        "auto_inter_complexity_canon_mini_agent_1bc1996b7bc9ac2"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_reduce_inter_function_complexity_hotspots",
      "priority": 2,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect src/app.rs:1100-1300 and identify largest branching clusters.",
        "Extract one branch cluster into a helper function preserving behavior.",
        "Ensure no change to invariant gate ordering or dispatch semantics.",
        "Run cargo build --workspace.",
        "Run cargo test --workspace."
      ],
      "title": "Reduce branch complexity in dispatch_executor_submits (phase 1 extraction)"
    },
    {
      "id": "fix_route_gate_invalid_route_livelock_cluster",
      "issue_refs": [
        "route_gate_invalid_route_livelock_cluster"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39a_route_gate_promoted_invariant_progress",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect src/app.rs around lines 1125-1280 and identify the exact route-gate / invalid_route path producing recurrent churn.",
        "Patch the narrowest routing or precondition path so executor dispatch no longer loops on the same invalid_route blocker when inputs are otherwise recoverable.",
        "Preserve invariant-gate semantics and avoid regressing existing promoted invariant enforcement behavior.",
        "Run cargo build --workspace.",
        "Run cargo test --workspace."
      ],
      "title": "Fix route-gate invalid_route livelock before executor dispatch"
    },
    {
      "id": "reopen_route_gate_invalid_route_livelock_cluster_phase2",
      "issue_refs": [
        "route_gate_invalid_route_livelock_cluster"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39a_route_gate_promoted_invariant_progress",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "blocked",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect `src/app.rs` around `evaluate_executor_route_gates` and the `dispatch_executor_submits` call site to identify the remaining invalid_route churn path under the helper-based layout.",
        "Inspect fresh blocker evidence in `agent_state/blockers.json` and recent action-log evidence in `agent_state/default/actions.jsonl` to confirm the exact invalid_route trigger still dominating current cycles.",
        "Patch the narrowest remaining route-gate / precondition path so repeated recoverable `invalid_route` churn no longer hard-loops planner/executor dispatch.",
        "Preserve promoted invariant evaluation order, blocker recording, and all existing gate semantics outside the repaired path.",
        "Run `cargo build --workspace`.",
        "Run `cargo test --workspace`."
      ],
      "title": "Reopen route-gate invalid_route livelock repair against helper-based gate path"
    },
    {
      "id": "enforce_promoted_invariant_inv_a650f28b",
      "issue_refs": [
        "inv_gate_unenforced_inv_a650f28b"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39_close_promoted_invariant_enforcement_backlog",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect `src/app.rs` around `evaluate_executor_route_gates` and the current helper-based route-gate state assembly referenced by `inv_gate_unenforced_inv_a650f28b`.",
        "Inspect `agent_state/enforced_invariants.json` and `src/invariants.rs` for the exact predicate and required state tuple for INV-a650f28b.",
        "Patch the narrowest helper-based invariant-state injection or gate wiring so INV-a650f28b is enforced without changing unrelated route/executor invariant ordering.",
        "Preserve blocker recording, planner wake behavior, and existing gate semantics outside the repaired predicate path.",
        "Run `cargo build --workspace`.",
        "Run `cargo test --workspace`."
      ],
      "title": "Enforce promoted invariant INV-a650f28b in helper-based route gating"
    },
    {
      "id": "T1_route_gate_livelock_recovery_plan",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect src/app.rs route-gate evaluation and dispatch paths using symbol_window.",
        "Identify the exact condition causing repeated invalid_route without state progression.",
        "Correlate findings with runtime logs in agent_state if available.",
        "Design a minimal guard or state transition to prevent identical re-entry into invalid_route path.",
        "Verify invariant enforcement ordering and ensure no regression in existing gate semantics."
      ],
      "title": "Recover from route-gate invalid_route livelock and enforce remaining invariants"
    },
    {
      "id": "T_reduce_planner_prompt_overflow_top_n_compaction",
      "issue_refs": [
        "prompt_overflow_planner_followup_pending_reverification"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_14_derive_hardcoded_metadata",
      "priority": 2,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Regression-test linkage: if any source change becomes necessary, add or update a focused regression test or probe that exercises the authoritative planner prompt measurement path and asserts planner prompt bytes stay at or below `PROMPT_OVERFLOW_BYTES = 80000` before this task is marked done again.",
        "Read `agent_state/canon-mini-agent-logs.log` as the primary same-cycle planner prompt measurement artifact.",
        "Confirm the planner log is current-cycle fresh before trusting values.",
        "Parse the most recent fresh `[planner] step=<n> prompt_bytes=<m>` entries and compare each `<m>` against `PROMPT_OVERFLOW_BYTES = 80000`.",
        "If fresh current-cycle planner entries are all `<= 80000`, capture the concrete log evidence and stop without source changes.",
        "Only if a fresh current-cycle planner entry exceeds `80000`, continue the narrowest planner-context compaction path while preserving high-priority objectives and open-issue context.",
        "Run `cargo build --workspace` after any code change.",
        "Run `cargo test --workspace` after any code change."
      ],
      "title": "Reduce planner prompt injection size below the overflow threshold"
    },
    {
      "id": "enforce_promoted_invariant_inv_c2b90a1d",
      "issue_refs": [
        "inv_gate_unenforced_inv_c2b90a1d"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39_close_promoted_invariant_enforcement_backlog",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect `agent_state/enforced_invariants.json` for the exact predicate and required state tuple for `INV-c2b90a1d` (`actor_kind=solo`, `error_class=verification_failed`).",
        "Inspect `src/app.rs` route-gate state assembly and locate the current incorrect `actor_kind=verifier` wiring for `verification_failed`.",
        "Patch the narrowest route-gate state injection so the `verification_failed` path feeds `actor_kind=solo` with `error_class=verification_failed` before invariant evaluation.",
        "Preserve all existing route/executor gate ordering and other invariant-state injections.",
        "Add or update a focused regression test that exercises the `solo` + `verification_failed` predicate path for `INV-c2b90a1d`.",
        "Run `cargo build --workspace`.",
        "Run `cargo test --workspace`."
      ],
      "title": "Enforce promoted invariant INV-c2b90a1d in runtime dispatch"
    },
    {
      "id": "enforce_promoted_invariant_inv_77eff017",
      "issue_refs": [
        "inv_gate_unenforced_inv_77eff017"
      ],
      "objective_id": "obj_39_close_promoted_invariant_enforcement_backlog",
      "priority": 1,
      "status": "done",
      "steps": [
        "Inspect `agent_state/enforced_invariants.json` for the exact predicate, support evidence, and required state tuple for `INV-77eff017`.",
        "Inspect `src/app.rs` around lines `1011-1050` to find the narrowest missing invariant-state injection or gate wiring for `INV-77eff017`.",
        "Patch only the missing invariant-state injection or gate wiring needed for `INV-77eff017`, preserving existing route/executor ordering and blocker semantics.",
        "Add or update a focused regression test that exercises the `INV-77eff017` predicate path so the issue cannot silently reopen.",
        "Run `cargo build --workspace`.",
        "Run `cargo test --workspace`."
      ],
      "title": "Enforce promoted invariant INV-77eff017 in runtime dispatch"
    }
  ],
  "version": 2
}

diff --git a/SPEC.md b/SPEC.md
index c9648cd..41802de 100644
--- a/SPEC.md
+++ b/SPEC.md
@@ -115,6 +115,44 @@ The system is a deterministic event-driven loop with explicit roles.
 - `ActionResult`: `{ complete: bool, output: string }`.
 - `RunConfig`: timeouts, tool availability, and patch scope policy.
 
+### 1.5 Canonical Writer Infrastructure
+
+The orchestrator state machine is implemented as a **Canonical Writer** — a single deterministic gate for all serializable state mutations:
+
+```
+W(s_t, e) → s_{t+1}
+```
+
+Every state transition is represented as a typed `ControlEvent` variant, appended to the total-ordered log before the state transition executes. The gate is enforced by `CanonicalWriter::apply` in `src/canonical_writer.rs`.
+
+**Components:**
+
+| Component | Type | Role |
+|-----------|------|------|
+| `CanonicalWriter` | `src/canonical_writer.rs` | Single mutation gate: `apply(ControlEvent)` → logs then transitions |
+| `SystemState` | `src/system_state.rs` | All serializable orchestrator state (phase, lanes, pending flags, diffs) |
+| `RuntimeState` | `src/app.rs` | Non-serializable runtime-only state (tab handles, in-flight join sets) |
+| `ControlEvent` | `src/events.rs` | Typed enum of all valid state transitions (23 variants) |
+| `EffectEvent` | `src/events.rs` | Side-effect record (invariant violations, checkpoints) |
+| `Tlog` | `src/tlog.rs` | Append-only NDJSON event log at `AgentStateDir/tlog.ndjson` |
+
+**Invariant gate:** Before emitting a `ControlEvent`, callers invoke `evaluate_invariant_gate` (`src/invariants.rs`). On violation the caller calls `writer.record_violation(...)` — which appends to the tlog without advancing state — and aborts the transition.
+
+**`RuntimeState` fields** (never serialized, never checkpointed):
+- `submitted_turns: HashMap<(u32, u64), SubmittedExecutorTurn>` — active executor turns keyed by `(tab_id, turn_id)`
+- `executor_submit_inflight: HashMap<usize, PendingSubmitState>` — in-flight submit tasks per lane
+- `deferred_completions: HashMap<usize, VecDeque<DeferredExecutorCompletion>>` — completions queued while another is processing
+
+**`SystemState` key fields** (all serialized to checkpoint):
+- `phase`, `phase_lane`, `scheduled_phase` — orchestration phase tracking
+- `planner_pending`, `diagnostics_pending` — pending flags
+- `lanes: HashMap<usize, LaneState>` — per-lane `{pending, in_progress_by, latest_verifier_result, plan_text}`
+- `verifier_summary: Vec<String>` — per-lane verifier result summaries
+- `lane_active_tab`, `tab_id_to_lane`, `lane_steps_used`, `lane_next_submit_at_ms`, `lane_submit_in_flight`, `lane_prompt_in_flight` — executor dispatch bookkeeping
+- `submitted_turn_ids: HashMap<String, SubmittedTurnRecord>` — serializable record of in-flight executor turns
+
+**`apply_control_event`** (`src/system_state.rs`) is a pure function with no side effects. It is the only function permitted to construct `s_{t+1}` from `s_t`. All runtime code calls it exclusively through `CanonicalWriter::apply`.
+
 ### 1.2 Role State (per agent)
 - `prompt_kind: PromptKind`
 - `step: u64` (monotonic, starts at 1 per role cycle)
@@ -131,6 +169,7 @@ Canonical file paths are absolute under `Workspace` (see `src/constants.rs:3-11`
 - `LanePlan`: `PLANS/<instance>/executor-<id>.json` (preferred) or legacy `PLANS/executor-<id>.md` (see `src/tools.rs:49-63`)
 - `Violations`: `VIOLATIONS.json`
 - `Diagnostics`: runtime-configured instance-scoped path `PLANS/<instance>/diagnostics-<instance>.json`; legacy `DIAGNOSTICS.json` is still accepted for migration/read compatibility
+- `Tlog`: `AgentStateDir/tlog.ndjson` — total-ordered NDJSON event log written by `CanonicalWriter`; one JSON record per line with fields `seq`, `ts_ms`, `event`. Authoritative replay source for all state transitions.
 
 ### 1.4 Workspace Resolution Rule
 Every `path` field in every action is resolved as follows:
@@ -348,7 +387,7 @@ The orchestrator uses wakeup flags and `planner_pending` / `diagnostics_pending`
 ```
 Role emits message{to=Planner}
   -> persist_inbound_message() writes last_message_to_planner.json + wakeup_planner.flag
-  -> dispatch_state.planner_pending = true
+  -> writer.apply(ControlEvent::PlannerPendingSet { pending: true })   [logged to tlog]
   -> next orchestration loop iteration: apply_wake_flags() schedules planner
   -> planner prompt injects inbound message via inject_inbound_message()
 ```

diff --git a/SPEC.md b/SPEC.md
index c9648cd..6260203 100644
--- a/SPEC.md
+++ b/SPEC.md
@@ -115,6 +115,44 @@ The system is a deterministic event-driven loop with explicit roles.
 - `ActionResult`: `{ complete: bool, output: string }`.
 - `RunConfig`: timeouts, tool availability, and patch scope policy.
 
+### 1.5 Canonical Writer Infrastructure
+
+The orchestrator state machine is implemented as a **Canonical Writer** — a single deterministic gate for all serializable state mutations:
+
+```
+W(s_t, e) → s_{t+1}
+```
+
+Every state transition is represented as a typed `ControlEvent` variant, appended to the total-ordered log before the state transition executes. The gate is enforced by `CanonicalWriter::apply` in `src/canonical_writer.rs`.
+
+**Components:**
+
+| Component | Type | Role |
+|-----------|------|------|
+| `CanonicalWriter` | `src/canonical_writer.rs` | Single mutation gate: `apply(ControlEvent)` → logs then transitions |
+| `SystemState` | `src/system_state.rs` | All serializable orchestrator state (phase, lanes, pending flags, diffs) |
+| `RuntimeState` | `src/app.rs` | Non-serializable runtime-only state (tab handles, in-flight join sets) |
+| `ControlEvent` | `src/events.rs` | Typed enum of all valid state transitions (23 variants) |
+| `EffectEvent` | `src/events.rs` | Side-effect record (invariant violations, checkpoints) |
+| `Tlog` | `src/tlog.rs` | Append-only NDJSON event log at `AgentStateDir/tlog.ndjson` |
+
+**Invariant gate:** Before emitting a `ControlEvent`, callers invoke `evaluate_invariant_gate` (`src/invariants.rs`). On violation the caller calls `writer.record_violation(...)` — which appends to the tlog without advancing state — and aborts the transition.
+
+**`RuntimeState` fields** (never serialized, never checkpointed):
+- `submitted_turns: HashMap<(u32, u64), SubmittedExecutorTurn>` — active executor turns keyed by `(tab_id, turn_id)`
+- `executor_submit_inflight: HashMap<usize, PendingSubmitState>` — in-flight submit tasks per lane
+- `deferred_completions: HashMap<usize, VecDeque<DeferredExecutorCompletion>>` — completions queued while another is processing
+
+**`SystemState` key fields** (all serialized to checkpoint):
+- `phase`, `phase_lane`, `scheduled_phase` — orchestration phase tracking
+- `planner_pending`, `diagnostics_pending` — pending flags
+- `lanes: HashMap<usize, LaneState>` — per-lane `{pending, in_progress_by, latest_verifier_result, plan_text}`
+- `verifier_summary: Vec<String>` — per-lane verifier result summaries
+- `lane_active_tab`, `tab_id_to_lane`, `lane_steps_used`, `lane_next_submit_at_ms`, `lane_submit_in_flight`, `lane_prompt_in_flight` — executor dispatch bookkeeping
+- `submitted_turn_ids: HashMap<String, SubmittedTurnRecord>` — serializable record of in-flight executor turns
+
+**`apply_control_event`** (`src/system_state.rs`) is a pure function with no side effects. It is the only function permitted to construct `s_{t+1}` from `s_t`. All runtime code calls it exclusively through `CanonicalWriter::apply`.
+
 ### 1.2 Role State (per agent)
 - `prompt_kind: PromptKind`
 - `step: u64` (monotonic, starts at 1 per role cycle)
@@ -131,6 +169,7 @@ Canonical file paths are absolute under `Workspace` (see `src/constants.rs:3-11`
 - `LanePlan`: `PLANS/<instance>/executor-<id>.json` (preferred) or legacy `PLANS/executor-<id>.md` (see `src/tools.rs:49-63`)
 - `Violations`: `VIOLATIONS.json`
 - `Diagnostics`: runtime-configured instance-scoped path `PLANS/<instance>/diagnostics-<instance>.json`; legacy `DIAGNOSTICS.json` is still accepted for migration/read compatibility
+- `Tlog`: `AgentStateDir/tlog.ndjson` — total-ordered NDJSON event log written by `CanonicalWriter`; one JSON record per line with fields `seq`, `ts_ms`, `event`. Authoritative replay source for all state transitions.

+Implementation: `cycle_state_hash`, `write_livelock_report` in `src/app.rs`; constant `STALL_CYCLE_THRESHOLD = 5`. Livelock detection reads inflight state from `RuntimeState` (`rt`) and serializable state from `writer.state()`.
 
 **Diagnostics report schema note:** The canonical `DiagnosticsReport` shape (defined in `src/reports.rs`) contains `status`, `inputs_scanned`, `ranked_failures`, and `planner_handoff`. The runtime reconciliation function (`reconcile_diagnostics_report` in `src/prompt_inputs.rs`) uses a typed round-trip through `DiagnosticsReport` so no unrecognised fields can be introduced — extra fields cannot survive re-serialisation of the struct.
 
@@ -531,8 +570,9 @@ In self-modification mode only:
 
 **I13 — No permission escalation:** Executor must not patch `src/tools.rs::patch_scope_error` or any other scope-guard logic in a way that expands role permissions beyond SPEC.md §4. Any such patch requires verifier sign-off with explicit SPEC.md §4 justification.
 
-**I14 — Checkpoint compatibility:** Changes to `OrchestratorCheckpoint` fields must use `#[serde(default)]` for additions. Removing or renaming fields requires a version bump or checkpoint discard on load. The `workspace` field must always be populated on save and validated on load.
-Checkpoint `phase` values include `planner`, `executor`, `verifier`, `diagnostics`, and `solo`.
+**I14 — Checkpoint and tlog compatibility:** Changes to `OrchestratorCheckpoint` fields must use `#[serde(default)]` for additions. Removing or renaming fields requires a version bump or checkpoint discard on load. The `workspace` field must always be populated on save and validated on load. Checkpoint `phase` values include `planner`, `executor`, `verifier`, `diagnostics`, and `solo`.
+
+Changes to `SystemState` fields follow the same rule: additions must use `#[serde(default)]`. The tlog (`AgentStateDir/tlog.ndjson`) is append-only and may contain entries from prior `SystemState` schemas; readers must tolerate unknown `ControlEvent` variants gracefully. Changes to `ControlEvent` variants are additive only — existing variants must not be renamed or removed while a tlog from that schema may be in service.
 
 ### 9.4 Safety Properties (Why It's Safe)
 - **No mid-run corruption:** The running orchestrator binary is already loaded into memory. Patching `src/` files does not affect the current process — changes take effect only on the next `cargo build` + process restart.
